description_long: This is a long, rectangular bench with a minimalist design, featuring a flat, tan-colored seat surface and two solid, angular side supports in a reddish-brown hue. The seat has a series of evenly spaced rectangular slots, likely for ventilation or water drainage, making it suitable for outdoor use. The bench is constructed from what appears to be metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The legs are integrated into the side panels, forming a continuous L-shape that provides both support and a modern aesthetic. There are no backrests or armrests, emphasizing its utilitarian function and maximizing seating space. The overall design is sleek and functional, ideal for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or transit stops.
description: A long, minimalist metal bench with a tan seat, reddish-brown angular side supports, and rectangular ventilation slots. It has no backrest or armrests, emphasizing a modern, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the solid, angular reddish-brown side support and the flat tan seat surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the bench, the tan seat with rectangular slots, and both side supports.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the other side support and seat edge.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back edge of the seat and both side supports, similar to the front but from the opposite side.
